text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clack, rattle... Clack...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's snowing even harder... There's normally a beautiful view of the
stars here. I'm not sure how tonight will turn out though.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa, look at all that snow. When did it pile up so high?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It started coming down nearly thirty minutes ago. You really lose
yourself in that game of yours.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: 'Cause you...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Nothin'. I was just thinking how the snow's white as your hair.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't be silly. But never mind. If it gets any worse, it'll start
snowing down the whole mountain. And if that happens...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ticket won't be able to make it up here, even if she's feeling better.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Her safety won't be guaranteed... But even if we say it's dangerous,
she'll likely try to come anyway. What can I do...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, just forget Ticket for a while. There's no use getting upset over
stuff we can't control.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But Ticket—if she...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
She isn't struggling this hard just to let a little snow stop her. I'm sure
she already got better by screaming "Sickness is all in the mind!"

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And I really don't wanna give this present by myself...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, aren't you the one who said she'd make a miracle happen?
Don't chicken out in your beliefs now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...I've got such wonderful friends.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? How so?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Both you and Ticket always show me a completely different
perspective than my own. Like just now with you, Taishin. Having you
here is so reassuring.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You're never shy to tell me your opinion, and you're incredibly
considerate. Are you feeling bad that I've been preparing things all
by myself?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Not really.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Then let me tell you what you were about to say earlier. " 'Cause
you won't let me help at all, so all I can do is play games."

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you really are kind. But some people would rather please their
friends by taking care of them.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Put more explicitly, simply having you two be here is enough for me. So I may have been overenthusiastic about doing everything myself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Shall we call Ticket? I'll tell her that we're all ready here, and to take
her time coming.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Like you know me, dummy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle... Clack, clack...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Did you say something?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Me? No. It's just the wind outside. The snow's getting even heavier...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Oguri! Weren't you cold outside? Just hold on a little. We'll have
some piping hot food ready soon!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh, okay... Thank you! I can't wait.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I am excited, but... this isn't good. I just... I don't have a present!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't find any reindeer, and now that I think about it, I don't even
have a beard... Maybe I can't become Santa in time. I don't know...

text_block_list.name: Child Fan A
text_block_list.text: Huh? There's no star?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What's wrong? Did something happen?

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, er... It's about the star to decorate our tree. The children made it
specially for tonight, so we were taking great care in carrying it over,
but...

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
It's a blizzard out there right now. And, well, it seems the road up
here has been closed.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Meaning... we have no star...

text_block_list.name: Child Fan A
text_block_list.text: Can't we do anything?! You'd really like the star, Oguri! It's amazing!

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... It's a terrible shame, but cars can't make it up here with the
road closed. We'll just have to wait until tomorrow for her to see the
star.

text_block_list.name: Child Fan A
text_block_list.text:
But the star's for tonight's party. I really thought it'd make Oguri feel
better...

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa there, let's not mention that.

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
Gee... Looks like our surprise fell apart... I'm sorry. But I'm sure once
the party begins, the kids will feel better—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'll go.

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'll go... and get the star.
